---
title: "CV"
page-layout: full
---

```{=html}
<div class="page-header">
  <h1>Curriculum Vitae</h1>
</div>

<div class="cv-wrapper">

  <!-- PUBLICATIONS -->
  <h2 class="cv-section-title">Selected Publications <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?hl=en&user=18wi0WoAAAAJ" class="cv-external-link" target="_blank">Google Scholar &nearr;</a></h2>

  <div class="cv-pub">
    Lu Z*, Anns J*, Mai Y*, <strong>Xu S*†</strong> et al. Getting over ANOVA: Estimation graphics for multi-group comparisons. (co-corresponding, in revision). bioRxiv 2026.
  </div>

  <div class="cv-pub">
    <strong>Xu S</strong> et al. Contextualized ethomics reveals a <em>Drosophila</em>
    serotonergic circuit controlling satiety. (in revision).
  </div>

  <div class="cv-pub">
    <strong>Xu S†</strong>, Das G, Hueske E, Tonegawa S†. Dorsal raphe serotonergic neurons
    control intertemporal choice under trade-off. <em>Current Biology</em> 2017;
    27(22):3440–3451. (Co-corresponding; 48 citations.)
  </div>

  <div class="cv-pub">
    Zhang X, <strong>Xu S</strong>, Ho J, Stewart JC, Claridge-Chang A. A mushroom-body
    output neuron that mediates octopamine-driven and hunger-motivated feeding in
    <em>Drosophila</em>. bioRxiv 2026.
  </div>

  <div class="cv-pub">
    Ott S, <strong>Xu S</strong>, Lee N, Hong I, Anns J, et al. Kalium channelrhodopsins
    effectively inhibit neurons. <em>Nature Communications</em> 2024; 15:3480.
  </div>

  <div class="cv-pub">
    <strong>Xu S</strong>, Zhang X, Cheung KY, Mai Y, Wu Y, Claridge-Chang A.
    Long-Stokes-Shift mScarlet3 as a structural marker for two-photon imaging.
    bioRxiv 2026.
  </div>

  <div class="cv-pub">
    Bari A, <strong>Xu S</strong> et al. Differential attentional control mechanisms by
    two distinct noradrenergic pathways. <em>PNAS</em> 2020; 117(46):29080–29089.
    (119 citations.)
  </div>

  <div class="cv-pub">
    Kim J, ..., <strong>Xu S</strong>, Tonegawa S. Antagonistic negative and positive
    neurons of the basolateral amygdala. <em>Nature Neuroscience</em> 2016;
    19(12):1636–1646. (550 citations.)
  </div>


  <!-- EXPERIENCE -->
  <h2 class="cv-section-title">Experience</h2>
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <span class="cv-entry-main">Senior Research Fellow &mdash; Duke-NUS Medical School Singapore</span>
    <span class="cv-entry-date">2017–present</span>
  </div>
  <p style="font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--warm-grey); margin: -0.5rem 0 1.2rem; padding-left: 0.1rem;">
    Computational ethomics for internal state detection. Epitranscriptomics of native RNA states.
  </p>
  <div class="cv-entry">
    <span class="cv-entry-main">Senior Research Fellow / Research Fellow &mdash; IMCB, A*STAR Singapore</span>
    <span class="cv-entry-date">2017–present</span>
  </div>
  <p style="font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--warm-grey); margin: -0.5rem 0 1.2rem; padding-left: 0.1rem;">
    Automatic behavior tracking. Estimation statistics. Computational ethomics. Epitranscriptomics of native RNA states.
  </p>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <span class="cv-entry-main">Postdoctoral Associate &mdash; Tonegawa Lab, MIT</span>
    <span class="cv-entry-date">2016–2017</span>
  </div>
  <p style="font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--warm-grey); margin: -0.5rem 0 1.2rem; padding-left: 0.1rem;">
    Characterised serotonergic control of intertemporal choice in mice (<em>Current Biology</em> 2017).
  </p>


  <!-- EDUCATION -->
  <h2 class="cv-section-title">Education</h2>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <span class="cv-entry-main">PhD Systems Neuroscience &mdash; MIT</span>
    <span class="cv-entry-date">2016</span>
  </div>
  <p style="font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--warm-grey); margin: -0.5rem 0 1.2rem; padding-left: 0.1rem;">
    Supervisor: Susumu Tonegawa.
    Dissertation: <a href="https://dspace.mit.edu/entities/publication/c9824c48-d937-47ff-a7d2-937ef1828507">Control of intertemporal choice by dorsal raphe serotonergic neurons</a>.
  </p>

  <div class="cv-entry">
    <span class="cv-entry-main">BS Biology (Minor: Music) &mdash; UC San Diego</span>
    <span class="cv-entry-date">2007</span>
  </div>
  <p style="font-size: 0.95rem; color: var(--warm-grey); margin: -0.5rem 0 1.2rem; padding-left: 0.1rem;">
    Supervisor: Charles Zuker. Undergraduate Dissertation: A Novel Trans-Synaptic Neuronal Tracing Strategy.
  </p>


  <!-- SKILLS -->
  <h2 class="cv-section-title">Technical Skills</h2>

  <div class="skills-cloud">
    <span class="skill-tag">Python</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">R</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Git</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">nbdev</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Quarto</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">pandas</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">NumPy</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">SciPy</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">PyTorch</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">matplotlib</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">LLM-as-Judge</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">DSPy</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">LangGraph</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Claude API</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">agentic evals</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">adversarial red-teaming</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">prompt engineering</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">bootstrap CI</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">effect size estimation</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">uncertainty quantification</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">causal inference</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">A/B testing</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">experimental design</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">Oxford Nanopore</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">direct RNA-seq</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">epitranscriptomics</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">DeepLabCut</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">SLEAP</span>
    <span class="skill-tag">SQL</span>
  </div>


  <!-- RECOGNITION -->
  <h2 class="cv-section-title">Recognition</h2>

  <div class="award-item">Outstanding Short Talk Award — Neuroscience Singapore 2025</div>
  <div class="award-item">Walle Nauta Award for Excellence in Graduate Teaching — MIT, 2011</div>
  <div class="award-item">Gold Medal — 17th International Festival of Advent and Christmas Music, Prague, 2007</div>
  <div class="award-item">Honourable Mention — Singapore Physics Olympiad, 2002</div>


  <!-- ARTS -->
  <h2 class="cv-section-title">Arts</h2>

  <div class="award-item">Painter — 22nd UOB Painting of the Year Exhibition, Singapore, 2003</div>
  <div class="award-item">Ceramicist — The Art of the Cup, Cambridge, MA, USA, 2014</div>

</div>
```
